languages.text: "Нет, Лорд-капитан, мы располагаем лишь предположениями губернатор-полковника: возможно вы разъярили стаю, убив Погонщицу под Клетью или начался некий особый, неизвестный нам цикл планеты. Слуги династии на Заркове уже начали расследование причин, но это займет время и не поможет в решении текущей ситуации — меры необходимо принять немедленно".

traits.locale_text: "Нет, Лорд-капитан, мы располагаем лишь предположениями губернатор-полковника: возможно вы разъярили стаю, убив Погонщицу под Клетью или начался некий особый, неизвестный нам цикл планеты. Слуги династии на Заркове уже начали расследование причин, но это займет время и не поможет в решении текущей ситуации — меры необходимо принять немедленно".

languages.text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the Colonel-Governor's theories. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some planetary cycle we know nothing about. The dynasty's servants on Zarkov have already begun investigating, but that will take time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."
languages.original_text: "Нет, Лорд-капитан, мы располагаем лишь предположениями губернатор-полковника: возможно вы разъярили стаю, убив Погонщицу под Клетью или начался некий особый, неизвестный нам цикл планеты. traits.locale_text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the colonel-governor's assumptions. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some new planetary cycle we know nothing about. Dynasty servants on Zarkov have already begun looking into it, but that requires time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."

"The report only contains the Castellan-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

languages.text: 「この報告書には、城守の推測しか記されていません。原因は、あなたが殺した放牧者の死かもしれません。あるいは、私たちが知らない特別なサイクルかもしれません。いずれにしても、ザルコフの王朝代表はすでに調査を開始しています」
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Castellan-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

traits.locale_text: 「この報告書には、城守の推測しか記されていません。原因は、あなたが殺した放牧者の死かもしれません。あるいは、私たちが知らない特別なサイクルかもしれません。いずれにしても、ザルコフの王朝代表はすでに調査を開始しています。」

languages.text: «Negativo, Lord Capitán. Nos basamos únicamente en las teorías de{nc| la coronel-gobernadora|l coronel-gobernador}. Puede que haya enfadado a la manada matando al Pastor bajo la Jaula, o puede ser parte de un ciclo planetario desconocido para nosotros. Los sirvientes de la dinastía en Zarkov ya han empezado a investigar, pero eso llevará tiempo y no resolverá la situación actual. Debemos actuar sin demora».
languages.original_text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the Colonel-Governor's theories. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some planetary cycle we know nothing about. The dynasty's servants on Zarkov have already begun investigating, but that will take time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."

traits.locale_text: «Negativo, Lord Capitán. Nos basamos únicamente en las teorías de{nc| la coronel-gobernadora|l coronel-gobernador}. Puede que haya enfadado a la manada matando al Pastor bajo la Jaula, o puede ser parte de un ciclo planetario desconocido para nosotros. Los sirvientes de la dinastía en Zarkov ya han empezado a investigar, pero eso llevará tiempo y no resolverá la situación actual. Debemos actuar sin demora».

languages.text: “不一定，舰长大人。我们目前只是在根据总督上校的推测行事。也许是因为您在牢笼下杀了一只拒生花，所以激怒了整个怪物群，也可能是因为某种我们尚不了解的行星周期的运动。扎尔科夫的王朝仆从已经开始调查，但短时间内不会有结果，更无法解决当下的危机。我们必须立刻采取行动。”
languages.original_text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the Colonel-Governor's theories. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some planetary cycle we know nothing about. The dynasty's servants on Zarkov have already begun investigating, but that will take time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."

traits.locale_text: “不一定，舰长大人。我们目前只是在根据总督上校的推测行事。也许是因为您在牢笼下杀了一只拒生花，所以激怒了整个怪物群，也可能是因为某种我们尚不了解的行星周期的运动。扎尔科夫的王朝仆从已经开始调查，但短时间内不会有结果，更无法解决当下的危机。我们必须立刻采取行动。”

languages.text: "Negativ, Lord Captain. Wir operieren allein mit den Theorien des Colonel-Gouverneurs. Vielleicht habt Ihr das Rudel gereizt, als Ihr den Treiber unter dem Käfig erschlagen habt ... oder wir haben es mit einem planetaren Zyklus zu tun, von dem wir nichts wissen. Die Diener der Dynastie auf Zarkov haben bereits Ermittlungen eingeleitet, aber sie werden eine Weile dauern und helfen uns im Moment nicht weiter. Wir müssen umgehend handeln."
languages.original_text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the Colonel-Governor's theories. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some planetary cycle we know nothing about. The dynasty's servants on Zarkov have already begun investigating, but that will take time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."

traits.locale_text: "Negativ, Lord Captain. Wir operieren allein mit den Theorien des Colonel-Gouverneurs. Vielleicht habt Ihr das Rudel gereizt, als Ihr den Treiber unter dem Käfig erschlagen habt ... oder wir haben es mit einem planetaren Zyklus zu tun, von dem wir nichts wissen. Die Diener der Dynastie auf Zarkov haben bereits Ermittlungen eingeleitet, aber sie werden eine Weile dauern und helfen uns im Moment nicht weiter. Wir müssen umgehend handeln."

languages.text: "Olumsuz Lord Kaptan. Sadece Vali Albay'ın teorilerine göre hareket ediyoruz. Belki Kafes'in altındaki Çoban'ı öldürerek sürüyü öfkelendirdik, belki de hakkında hiçbir şey bilmediğimiz bir gezegen döngüsü yaşanıyor. Hanedanlığın Zarkov'daki hizmetkârları araştırmaya çoktan başladı ancak bu zaman alacak ve mevcut durumu çözmeyecek. Gecikmeden harekete geçmeliyiz."
languages.original_text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the Colonel-Governor's theories. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some planetary cycle we know nothing about. The dynasty's servants on Zarkov have already begun investigating, but that will take time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."

traits.locale_text: "Olumsuz Lord Kaptan. Sadece Vali Albay'ın teorilerine göre hareket ediyoruz. Belki Kafes'in altındaki Çoban'ı öldürerek sürüyü öfkelendirdik, belki de hakkında hiçbir şey bilmediğimiz bir gezegen döngüsü yaşanıyor. Hanedanlığın Zarkov'daki hizmetkârları araştırmaya çoktan başladı ancak bu zaman alacak ve mevcut durumu çözmeyecek. Gecikmeden harekete geçmeliyiz."

languages.text: « Négatif, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous opérons uniquement sur la base des théories {nc|de la colonelle-gouverneure|du colonel-gouverneur}. Peut-être avez-vous enragé la meute en tuant le Chasseur sous la Cage, ou peut-être qu'il s'agit là d'un cycle planétaire dont nous ignorons tout... Les serviteurs de la dynastie sur Zarkov ont déjà commencé à mener leur enquête, mais elle prendra un certain temps et ne résoudra pas nos problèmes actuels. Nous devons agir sans attendre. »
languages.original_text: "Negative, Lord Captain. We are operating solely on the Colonel-Governor's theories. Perhaps you enraged the pack by slaying the Drover beneath the Cage, or it could be some planetary cycle we know nothing about. The dynasty's servants on Zarkov have already begun investigating, but that will take time and won't resolve the current situation. We must act without delay."
